decisions.summary: rollback_sensitive bounded by additive matcher migration and legacy compatibility window
decisions.reason: rollback_plan: revert src/pr-manager.js, src/requirement-consistency.js, tests, Story, and spec docs to restore legacy summary keyword behavior. feature_gate_disabled_behavior: no feature flag or persisted state is introduced; disabling the migration is a code revert while legacy keyword compatibility remains enabled until at least 2026-08-05. upgrade_downgrade_test: focused regression covers structured and legacy evidence paths together, so mixed evidence recorded before and after the migration remains accepted during the compatibility window. accepted_followups: legacy keyword removal is a later Story after deprecation window data is reviewed.

decisions.reason: The implementation touches one coherent gate behavior: evidence resolution in pr-manager, inherited behavior consistency in requirement-consistency, one spec, and focused regression tests.
